name: Music Player
description: A comprehensive music playback application for NextUI featuring local file playback, online radio streaming, and music downloading.
author: nborodikhin

changelog.v1.10.0: Allow to add folder to a playlist, usability updates
changelog.v1.9.0: Fix regression in scrolling text display
changelog.v1.7.6: Added playback speed control for podcasts and fixed the volume stepping issue
changelog.v1.7.4: Fixed online radio failed to play redirected stream URL (https)
changelog.v1.7.3: Fixed black screen issue on TG5050 when exiting the keyboard
changelog.v1.7.2: Fixed app failed to launch on tg5050 (TSPS)
changelog.v1.7.1: Fixed a bug that caused certain podcast cannot be downloaded
changelog.v1.7.0: Background playback - music, radio, and podcasts keep playing while navigating the app
